TheSeaborne-AmberGemPower.title: Amber
TheSeaborne-AmberGemPower.description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn costs less and exhausts.
TheSeaborne-AutoCannonPower.title: Auto Cannon
TheSeaborne-AutoCannonPower.description: Fire the cannon at the start of your turn.
TheSeaborne-CastPower.title: Cast
TheSeaborne-CastPower.description: Hooks a card in your discard pile. Each stack goes one card deeper. Removed when you Reel.
TheSeaborne-DiamondGemPower.title: Diamond
TheSeaborne-DiamondGemPower.description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains Wet.
TheSeaborne-EmeraldGemPower.title: Emerald
TheSeaborne-EmeraldGemPower.description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains extra buff or debuff stacks.
TheSeaborne-EnchantedRodPower.title: Enchanted Rod
TheSeaborne-EnchantedRodPower.descriptio: The first card reeled each turn is Imbued.
TheSeaborne-EvasivePower.title: Evasive
TheSeaborne-EvasivePower.description: Gain Slippery, but cannot gain Block.
TheSeaborne-FullyLoadedPower.title: Fully Loaded
TheSeaborne-GemSlotPower.title: Gem Slot
TheSeaborne-GemSlotPower.description: Allows the Seaborne to hold one additional gem.
TheSeaborne-GildedPower.title: Gilded
TheSeaborne-GildedPower.description: The first time each turn you have 10 cards in hand, gain Energy.
TheSeaborne-IdolatryPower.title: Idolatry
TheSeaborne-IdolatryPower.description: Whenever you play a card with a modifier, damage all enemies.
TheSeaborne-ImbuedPower.title: Imbued
TheSeaborne-ImbuedPower.description: Card gains double effect when a modifier is applied to it.
TheSeaborne-JinxPower.title: Jinx
TheSeaborne-JinxPower.description: Buffs and debuffs you apply are increased.
TheSeaborne-LoadedCannonballPower.title: Loaded Cannonball
TheSeaborne-LoadedCannonballPower.descri: Tracks cannonballs loaded into the cannon for Seaborne v0.1.
TheSeaborne-MasterbaitPower.title: Masterbait
TheSeaborne-MasterbaitPower.description: Whenever you Reel, Reel one more card.
TheSeaborne-OpalGemPower.title: Opal
TheSeaborne-OpalGemPower.description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains Cast and Reel.
TheSeaborne-RubyGemPower.title: Ruby
TheSeaborne-RubyGemPower.description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains extra damage.
TheSeaborne-SapphireGemPower.title: Sapphire
TheSeaborne-SapphireGemPower.description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains extra damage.
TheSeaborne-ShardyShrapnelPower.title: Shardy Shrapnel
TheSeaborne-ShardyShrapnelPower.descript: Cannon shots deal additional shrapnel damage.
TheSeaborne-SlipperyPower.title: Slippery
TheSeaborne-SlipperyPower.description: Placeholder defensive keyword for Seaborne v0.1.
TheSeaborne-SorcererFormPower.title: Sorcerer Form
TheSeaborne-TorrentsPower.title: Torrents
TheSeaborne-TorrentsPower.description: When Waterwall deflects an attack, returns that damage to the attacker.
TheSeaborne-TrancePower.title: Trance
TheSeaborne-TrancePower.description: Enemy intent is interrupted while Trance remains. At the start of the player turn, loses 1 plus Trance Resistance, then gains 1 Trance Resistance.
TheSeaborne-TranceResistancePower.title: Trance Resistance
TheSeaborne-TranceResistancePower.descri: Increases the amount of Trance removed each player turn.
TheSeaborne-WaterwallPower.title: Waterwall
TheSeaborne-WaterwallPower.description: Blocks attack damage only if the damage is less than or equal to Waterwall. Blocks nothing against larger hits. Removed at the start of your turn.
TheSeaborne-WetCardPower.title: Wet
TheSeaborne-WetCardPower.description: This card can trigger its Wet effect when reeled. This does not count as playing it.
